top_signals.title: Itausa, GIC and Equipav Said to Create Group to Bid for Copasa
top_signals.summary: Itausa SA, the Singapore sovereign wealth fund GIC and Equipav Saneamento SA are planning to jointly bid to become strategic investors in the privatization process for Copasa, the sanitation company owned by the government of Minas Gerais, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The US Navy is full speed ahead on building a laser fleet
top_signals.summary: Operation Epic Fury may have strengthened the case for laser weapons, but the U.S. Navy’s dream of putting one on every ship may take longer than expected.
